stack.frontend: Inertia v2 + React 18 + Vite 8 + Tailwind v3

findings.title: password.update POST has no rate limit
findings.description: Route::put('password', ...) is registered outside the throttle:6,1 subgroup. No brute-force protection.
findings.recommendation: Move inside throttle:6,1 subgroup or attach explicit throttle:6,1.

findings.title: Mutating endpoints in routes/admin.php lack explicit throttle (categorical)
findings.description: Resource controllers (penggajian, pegawai, jadwal, laporan, presensi, backup, izin, komponen-gaji, users, roles) and most named POST actions have no per-endpoint throttle.
findings.recommendation: Add throttle:10-30/min for write paths, 60/min for reads.

findings.title: KEUANGAN_API_URL defaults to insecure http://localhost:3000
findings.description: Plaintext HTTP default. If unset in prod, payroll payloads travel unencrypted.
findings.recommendation: Require HTTPS in prod; add startup guard aborting if APP_ENV=production and URL is not https.

findings.title: Sensitive Pegawai fields stored plaintext and exposed via public accessors
findings.description: nik, npwp, no_bpjs_kesehatan, no_bpjs_ketenagakerjaan not encrypted. Public *_decrypted accessors leak PII on any serialization.
findings.recommendation: Apply encrypted cast to those columns; gate *_decrypted accessors behind manage_master_data permission or remove them.

findings.title: Heavy POST endpoints missing throttle
findings.description: penggajian.run.store, penggajian.run.worksheet, penggajian.run.finalize, laporan.export, backup.store, komponen-gaji.tambah-komponen, users.import have no explicit throttle.

findings.title: LOG_LEVEL=debug default may leak context in production
findings.description: Debug logs may persist query bindings and request bodies to disk.
findings.recommendation: Set LOG_LEVEL=warning or error in production.

findings.title: CACHE_STORE=database adds DB load
findings.description: Cache reads/writes go through SQL instead of in-memory store.

findings.title: cuti_terpakai accessor N+1 risk
findings.description: Accessor queries pengajuanIzins per model serialization.
findings.recommendation: Eager-load in controllers or compute via query builder.

findings.title: Pegawai create falls back to password = NIK
findings.description: Silent default to plaintext NIK as password when no password supplied.
findings.recommendation: Generate random password + email, or require admin-supplied value.

findings.title: Pegawai import accepts null unit_sekolah_id
findings.description: Malformed import rows leave superadmin-imported Pegawai in unscoped pool.
findings.recommendation: Validate unit_sekolah_id is present except for explicit global staff flag.

findings.title: Pegawai foto deletion uses str_replace heuristic
findings.description: Storage path inferred from URL; can leave orphans or touch unrelated paths.
findings.recommendation: Store relative path on model; resolve via Storage::delete($pegawai->foto_path).

findings.title: ImageUploadService missing dimension cap
findings.description: Mime + size validated; no max dimension. 4K-base64 images accepted.

findings.title: cache.serializable_classes=false is secure-by-default (good)
findings.description: Blocks PHP object-injection gadget chain during cache unserialize.

findings.title: config/hashing.php and config/sanctum.php intentionally absent
findings.description: Framework defaults used (bcrypt cost 12); Sanctum installed but unused.

findings.title: HandleInertiaRequests eager-loads pengajuanIzins
findings.recommendation: Select only required fields or move eager-load to controller.

findings.title: PenggajianController generation iterates Pegawai one-by-one
findings.description: 100+ Pegawai edges the 10s budget per spec.
findings.recommendation: Prefetch components, scales, attendance counts, lembur data; group by key.

findings.title: New composite index on presensi added
findings.description: Index (pegawai_id, tanggal, tipe_presensi) added; verify with EXPLAIN post-deploy.

prioritized_fixes: H1: add throttle:6,1 to routes/auth.php password.update (30).
H2: attach throttle:10,1 to every mutating action in routes/admin.php (resource + named POST).
M1: override KEUANGAN_API_URL to HTTPS in production; add startup guard in AppServiceProvider.
M2: cast nik/npwp/no_bpjs_* to encrypted in Pegawai model; remove or gate *_decrypted accessors.
M3: throttle:10,1 on penggajian.run.store/worksheet/finalize, laporan.export, backup.store, komponen-gaji.tambah-komponen, users.import.
L1: override LOG_LEVEL=warning in production env.
L2: override CACHE_STORE=redis in production env.
L3: eager-load pengajuanIzins or move cuti_terpakai to controller; add index on (pegawai_id, jenis_izin, status).
L4: require explicit password on Pegawai create; remove NIK fallback.
L5: validate unit_sekolah_id in Pegawai import rows.
L6: store relative foto_path; replace str_replace with Storage::delete($pegawai->foto_path).
L7: cap max image dimension (~1600px) in ImageUploadService::storeBase64.
P2: defer pengajuanIzins eager-load to controllers that need it.
P4: prefetch komponens/skalas/attendance counts/lembur in PenggajianController; compute per-Pegawai from grouped arrays.
not_audited: database/seeders/* (not invoked; only RolePermissionSeeder briefly inspected).
tests/* (no tests written yet; outside scope).
app/Console/* (no scheduled commands affecting security reviewed).
vendor/* and node_modules/* (third-party code; audited via composer audit / npm audit only).
